name: Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
To make sauce, melt shortening in a skillet. Add flour; mix well.
Stir in chili powder and water. Bring to boil, cooking and stirring until thickened. (Should be thick enough for dipping corn tortillas.)
Filling: Cook ground beef until brown. Add diced onion, avocado and salt; mix thoroughly.
Dip corn tortillas in sauce. Fill with meat mixture and lots of cheese. Roll and serve piping hot.
Preparation time: 15 minutes
